## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Prophecy.ai's marketing strategy shifts and potential changes to GrowthX's engagement.](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Prophecy.ai is reevaluating marketing priorities, potentially cutting GrowthX contract (renewal Dec 2nd)](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Shift towards announcements/thought leadership vs SEO-focused content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Raj (CEO) taking hands-on approach to marketing, emphasizing technical, product-focused content](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Exploring new website structure and content approach, simplifying navigation](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Topics

### Marketing Strategy Pivot

  - [Moving away from SEO-focused blog content to announcements and thought leadership](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)
  - [Raj prefers highly technical, product-relevant content](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)
  - [Potential reduction in marketing spend, including agency partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=222.0)
  - [Challenges in aligning marketing efforts with rapidly changing business positioning](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=157.0)

### Content Creation and Management

  - [Raj taking active role in content creation (e.g., white paper)](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=468.0)
  - [Debate on keeping vs. removing existing blog content](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1585.0)
  - [Exploring new content types: case studies, visual content for campaigns](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Balancing technical depth with accessibility for non-expert audience](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1052.0)

### Website Restructuring

  - [Plans for simplified website structure with fewer pages](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Focus on immersive homepage experience with live feature demonstrations](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1536.0)
  - [Potential "Learning Center" to house webinars, guides, and SEO/LLM-friendly content](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
  - [Considering hidden blog content with HTML sitemap for crawlability](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1595.0)

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Alteryx emerging as direct competitor in AI data analysis space](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1272.0)
  - [Other players: Pecan AI, Tellius, FullStory entering the market](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1304.0)
  - [Challenges in differentiating in broad "AI data analysis platform" category](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1330.0)

### GrowthX Partnership

  - [Current pause on GrowthX engagement](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=200.0)
  - [Exploring potential areas where GrowthX can add value (e.g., newsletter management, competitive analysis)](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
  - [Need to align on strategy before determining future engagement scope](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Cody to meet with Ashley to clarify marketing priorities and potential GrowthX involvement](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Explore options for utilizing remaining GrowthX contract effectively](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1919.0)
  - [GrowthX team to internally discuss Prophecy.ai situation and potential solutions](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Marcel (GrowthX) may reach out to Raj directly to share insights](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Continue dialogue on potential future engagement models that align with Prophecy.ai's evolving needs](https://fathom.video/share/6GwrwSommjd_PYJ_Ap5YZx_s2ryrrxGT?tab=summary&timestamp=1899.0)
